description: Data transformation steps to run on Subawards before being inserted into Elasticsearch

script.source: if (ctx.sub_pop_state_code != null && ctx.sub_pop_congressional_code_current != null) {ctx.sub_pop_congressional_cur_agg_key = ctx.sub_pop_state_code + ctx.sub_pop_congressional_code_current;}
if (ctx.sub_pop_state_code != null && ctx.sub_pop_county_code != null) {ctx.sub_pop_county_agg_key = ctx.sub_pop_state_code + ctx.sub_pop_county_code;}

if (ctx.sub_recipient_location_state_code != null && ctx.sub_recipient_location_county_code != null) {ctx.sub_recipient_location_county_agg_key = ctx.sub_recipient_location_state_code + ctx.sub_recipient_location_county_code;}
